summary: Backend (8/8) and Frontend (all key flows) tested successfully for Healthca landing page. Backend endpoints all pass: GET /api/, POST/GET /api/appointments (200 + 422 for invalid email), POST /api/newsletter (200 + 409 dup + 422 invalid), and existing /api/status. Frontend loads with hero heading 'Modern Healthcare', all 5 floating stat cards, sticky navbar, 6 service cards, About section, FAQ accordion expansion, appointment form (submits successfully, POST /api/appointments returns 200, success toast 'Appointment requested!', form cleared), newsletter (subscribe toast + duplicate 'You're already subscribed' toast), and no horizontal overflow at 1440/768/375 widths.
passed: POST /api/appointments with valid payload -> 200 + id + created_at
GET /api/appointments returns list including created appointment (no _id)
Landing page loads at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL, no console errors (only expected 409 network log during dup test)
Hero heading contains 'Modern Healthcare'; all 5 hero-card-* (patients/online/rating/emergency/experience) visible
Navbar visible; sticky behavior on scroll functional
Services section renders exactly 6 service cards
Appointment form submission -> POST /api/appointments 200, success toast 'Appointment requested! We\'ll be in touch shortly.', form cleared
Newsletter subscribe -> 'Subscribed!' toast; duplicate submit -> 'You're already subscribed.' toast
No horizontal overflow at 1440, 768, 375 viewport widths
notes: Department field is a native <select> element; Playwright must use select_option(value=...) rather than click. This is not a bug - the UI works normally for real users. Counter animation (About) and hover effects on service cards were not asserted programmatically but sections render correctly. Testimonials auto-scroll and Doctors sections rendered based on page structure but not explicitly asserted.
